rationale: All 12 auth-gate runtime checks and all 7 adversarial checks passed against the production adapter-node build. Signing uses HMAC-SHA256 with timing-safe comparison; password compare is timing-safe; missing secrets fail closed. Two runtime-only bugs (login/tracker loop, adapter in wrong config file) were found and fixed during verification.
requiredOperatorFollowups: Rotate SECRET_KEY: generate a fresh value (python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(50))"). The committed key is burned. NOT done in code per plan.
Run backend tests / CI with DEBUG=true, or CI must otherwise disable SECURE_SSL_REDIRECT; else ~48 view tests 301-fail.
Remove or IP-restrict the nginx /api/ location block, or the auth gate is bypassed for direct API calls (documented in deploy README).
Set DASHBOARD_PASSWORD and SESSION_SECRET in the frontend production env (fail-closed if absent).
pnpm install already run locally; ensure pnpm-lock.yaml change is committed.
deviationsFromPlan: C-3: adapter wired in apps/frontend/vite.config.ts instead of apps/frontend/svelte.config.js, because the project passes sveltekit() options inline via Vite, which makes svelte.config.js inert. svelte.config.js was still updated to adapter-node for consistency. This achieves the plan's explicit, approved contract (adapter-node -> build/index.js).

hooks.server.ts: added an early resolve(event) for public paths so /login does not fall through to the pre-existing tracker redirect (loop fix). The plan's D-5 intent (login reachable, gate first) is preserved; proxy code unchanged.
